segments.text: 你不知道的趣味新鮮事
森林有很多树,空气也很新鲜,还能听到鸟叫声,而且森林都很大,对吧?
很多森林都很大一片,但也有迷你的小森林,有多小呢?
居然只有一個籃球場這麼大
The idea of very small forest is from Japan
Japan has thousands of these forests
People in many countries like this idea
Now, there are many of these forests in Asia, Europe, Africa, North and South America
迷你森林的概念來自日本
其他國家的人也喜歡這個想法
現在世界各地都有迷你森林
他們在夏天讓地方更涼快
一些森林也很適合走進去
它可以讓都市在夏天的時候涼快一點
所有森林有很多地區的樹木和植物
森林中的蟑螂、蝴蝶和其他小動物
雖然迷你森林面積很小,卻充滿生機
不但有原生的樹木、花草
这些很小的森林可以帮助城市、人类、动物和虫子
迷你森林对于动物、植物和人类都很有贡献
我经常在这公园里看到它们。
所以它们喜欢这个公园。
在那里,你看到有一只在树上吗?
Squirrels are very common in Taipei city, right?
松鼠在台北市很常見吧?
They are, in parks big and small
沒錯 大小公園裡都有

你不知道的趣味新鲜事
Hey, did you hear what five friends in Indonesia did?
They saw lots of trash, so they cleaned it up.
They cleaned up a river, but we can clean up this park.
你听说过印尼一群朋友他们的事迹吗?
他们看到河里有很多垃圾,就把河川清理干净。
The trash in this park is not very bad, but the trash in the river was a big problem.
河川里的垃圾很多 而且又脏又臭 还有塑胶袋 保特瓶 还有旧衣服阻塞了整条河
河川里的垃圾很多 而且又脏又臭 还有塑胶袋 保特瓶 还有旧衣服阻塞了整条河
這群朋友組成的小組,清理出很多袋的垃圾,他們也繼續清理別的河流跟海灘。
他們把整個過程開成影片,上傳到網路上。
Millions of people saw the videos.
Now, many people help the group.
They clean up rivers and beaches all over Indonesia.
很多人看到他们的影片,也加入他们一起清理印尼的河川跟海滩。
Five friends cleaned up one river.
Now, they clean up many rivers and beaches with their new friends.
Oh look, our park is clean.
这群朋友不但清理家附近的河川,也扩大到其他地方。
I can't wait to get rid of them
我知道 我也等不及要把他們扔掉了
Some of my friends came here on the weekend
We shared six pizzas, three bottles of coke and lots of fruit
我們分享六個披薩 三瓶可樂 還有好多水果
How many people saw the videos
App 让你随选 谁听 还有文字稿哦
It's time for News for Kids!
你不知道的趣味新鲜事!
It's when your body touches something and your body doesn't like it.
Your body tries to fight it.
People can have allergies to many things.
當你的身體接觸到不喜歡的東西時,它會反抗,產生過敏反應。
人們患上壞癌症,必須要很小心。
有一些过敏反应会让你皮肤痒、打喷嚏,但是严重的过敏反应,有一些人要很小心,会很危险。
That's why many foods have a special stamp.
It's very easy for nuts to get into food.
People with nut allergies need to be very very careful.
有一些食物都有標示含有堅果,
對堅果過敏的人要特別小心。
飛機上有一位女士對堅果
她發現空服員販賣的點心都是花生。
这个女士很害怕,她不要飞机上的乘客吃到花生,所以把他们全部买下来。
这个女士很害怕,她不要飞机上的乘客吃到花生,所以把他们全部买下来。
这个女士很害怕,她不要飞机上的乘客吃到花生,所以把他们全部买下来。
这个女士很害怕,她不要飞机上的乘客吃到花生,所以把他们全部买下来。
對花生過敏的女士,買了飛機上所有的花生。
red eyes 我鼻子癢,還有紅眼睛
You need to take some medicine 你需要吃一點藥
I did, I just spent 600 NT on allergy medicines 我吃了,剛剛才花了600塊買過敏藥
That should take care of it 那應該可以對付了
I wish I could fight it without medicine 我希望不吃藥就可以對抗
多睡一点,通常很有帮助。
How much did the woman spend on peanuts?
Six hundred and sixty six thousand dollars.
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Many visitors go to a beautiful town.
It has a 500 year old clock.
All visitors see and hear it.
The clock bell ring every hour.
很多旅客喜歡到義大利一個漂亮的小鎮。
那裡有一座500多年歷史的時鐘。
每一個整點都會敲響一次
But late at night, they didn't like hearing the bell
visitors were tired in the morning
They said, the bell is too loud
但是到了晚上,旅客都被吵得無法睡覺
生氣的說要讓鐘響停下來
this summer, the town stopped ringing the bell at night, but now, the local people can't sleep.
The bell rang at night for 500 years.
Now, the night is too quiet.
從這個夏天開始,晚上不會再有鐘響,但是當地的居民覺得太安靜了,他們反而睡不著。
这些旅客都没有顾虑到城镇和当地的居
游客跟当地居民经常想要不同的东西。
It's too loud 太大聲了
Do you have to use an alarm clock?
Just this morning 只有今天早上
I won't do it tomorrow 明天不會了
Didn't you go to bed early last night?
I did, but it's not enough.
I was too busy yesterday afternoon.
Now I'm going back to sleep.
Hey, you should get up now.
Do you use an alarm clock?
When did the visitors like to hear the bell?

This summer, Connor and his dad went to a big lake.
Connor caught something, but he didn't catch a fish.
It had a lot of money in it.
这个夏天,13岁的Connor跟他的爸爸去钓鱼。
但是,他没有钓到鱼,却钓到了一个钱包。
How much money was in the wallet?
居然有将近六万五千块台币
What did Connor do with the money?
Connor found a card in the wallet.
The card had a man's name and phone number on it.
他在錢包裡找到主人的名字跟電話
One year ago he went fishing and lost the wallet
Jim wanted to give Connor money to thank him
一年前他去釣魚的時候弄丟了
他想要拿錢給Connor表示感謝
但是,Connor不想要錢,他正是一個好孩子。
但是,Connor不想要錢,他正是一個好孩子。
Connor找到了很多錢,他還給了給Jim。
如果你找到錢,你會做什麼?
沒有釣到魚,卻釣到錢包的男孩,找到了錢包主人。
Oh oh, where is my wallet?
It must be in your bag
No, I can't find it now
Did you buy anything on your way here?
你来的路上有没有买东西?
Yeah, I bought a cup of tea
I also gave some money to Santa Claus 不對,等等,我也給了耶誕老公公一些錢。
Think 思想或是認為 Do you think Santa took my wallet?
你覺得他拿了我的錢包?
No, no, I think you dropped the wallet somewhere near him.
不,我覺得你在他附近掉了錢包。
這些字都是很常用的動詞。
What was Connor doing when he found the wallet?
Where was Connor when he found the wallet?
How much money was in the wallet?
The answers are all available on the ICRT website and app.

很多台灣家庭搬到美國生活
他們的小孩在那裡上學
亚利桑那州有一个台湾工厂,
很多台湾人在那里上班,他们的小孩就在当地上学。
美国亚利桑那州有一个台湾工厂,很多台湾人在那里上班,他们的小孩就在当地上学。
One school has 100 new students from Taiwan.
One student says the kids in her class are very friendly.
She says her teachers are nice.
有一间学校,来了一百位台湾学生。
有一位学生说,同学跟老师都很有善。
All the new students classes are in English.
所有的课程都是用英语受课,
所以学校的两位英文老师会帮助新学生学习英文。
但是其他的学生也能学到台湾的文化
臺灣員工的孩子們就上當地的學校
Do children like going to school in Taiwan?
臺灣的小孩喜歡上學嗎?
I don't know, you'd have to ask them
I myself loved it when I was young
我自己小時候很喜歡上學
She was mean, 一点也不,她很坏。
We were afraid of her, 我们都怕她。
But I enjoyed being with my friends, 但我喜欢跟朋友一起。
We played so much that we forgot about class, 我们玩到忘记要上课。
I guess I was ok 我覺得還好
We can use these words every day

How are the kids in the new students class?

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
今天是台灣和台灣人的日子,
所以我們要做一些新的事。
今天是台灣重要的日子。
我們要做一點不一樣的。
Put your arms out to the left and right.
Put your arms out to the left and right again.
Look, you made the old Double Ten Day logo.
两个人一起张开双臂,互相站在对方的旁边。
将是两个中文字,十,是双十节旧的标志。
This year, Double Ten Day has a new logo, so let's change your pose.
今年双十节有新的标志,让我们来换个动作。
Point your right leg out to the right.
Point your left arm out to the left.
Yes, you made the new logo.
用你的左腳,單腳站立,右腳往右邊伸,左手向左邊伸,右手舉起來,不要動,這就是新的標誌。
標誌有藍色、紅色跟白色,這些就是台灣國旗上的顏色。
This logo shows Taiwan's people are strong.
You are strong when change comes.
You try to make things good again.
你還站在那裡,你很強喔!
這個標誌也代表台灣人很堅強。
就算面對改變,也不會放棄。
Stand strong with your friends and family.
Make today a great Double Ten Day!
新的雙世界標誌用動作來表示,你學會了嗎?
左邊、右邊,我要怎樣才能搞對?
Stand still and let me show you
You see, the hand you use for chopsticks is the right hand
你看,拿筷子的手就是右手
So this is the right arm
Jane, you're moving the wrong arm again
Oh no, I thought I finally got this move right!
糟糕,我以為我終於做對了!
I give up on this dance, Nancy!
What does the new logo show about Taiwan's people?
What color is not on Taiwan's flag?

我看到R&T的新聞為孩子們
我們告訴你一個藝術家叫潘寧
大家還記得藝術家潘寧嗎?
兩年是很長的時間,我來幫你。
一間博物館請了漢寧做藝術。
他希望藝術可以展示人們的感受到工作。
漢寧是一位藝術家,博物館請他用畫來表達人對工作的想法。
人們努力為了賺錢,所以漢寧希望藝術可以賺錢。
他不想用塗畫或筆筆,他想用真正的錢。
人們工作是為了賺錢,所以哈寧想要把真的錢呈現在作品裡。
博物館借了哈寧的錢給他的藝術,他獲得了差不多2.
哈寧為了作品向博物館借了將近250萬台幣。
Then Hanning gave the museum his art.
Hanning寄了作品給博物館,但是是空白的。
Hanning called his art, take the money and run.
He took the money and ran.
漢寧把作品取名為《拿了錢就跑》,他還真的這麼做。
The museum put Hanning's art in a show, but it wanted its money back too.
This year, a judge said Hanning has to give the money back.
He says taking the money was the art.
博物館仍然展出漢寧的作品,
但他們想要把錢拿回來
可是他覺得把錢拿走就是那個作品的藝術
拿錢就跑的藝術家算不算是騙人?
I went to this art show last night
No, but I did talk with some artists 不过我有跟一些艺术家聊天
Yeah, and some of them told me they were making good money 对 而且有些跟我说他们赚的不少
I thought most artists were poor, 我以為大部分藝術家都很窮。
But some could sell a painting at 500,000 NT dollars, 但是他們有人一幅畫可以賣到50萬台幣。
One artist told me she got 1 million NT.
一位藝術家告訴我她賺了100萬。
Oh, why did I stop my drawing lessons?
我怎么会停止我的画画课?
What did Haning want to make his art with?
誰說漢寧必須把錢還給?

Some people say, all Montenegrins are lazy.
This is wrong too, and it's very silly.
蒙特内格罗是个欧洲的国家。
有人说,蒙特内格罗人都很懒惰,这样也是不对哦!
Most Montenegrins know this is silly.
They think it's so silly that it's funny.
So, they made a lazy game from this silly saying.
這個國家大部分的人知道這聽起來很傻,
但他們也覺得好笑,就舉辦了懶惰比賽。
What's the aim of this lazy game?
It's to stay in bed the longest.
The last player in bed wins lots of money.
誰躺在床上越久,就可以贏得獎金。
有一年,有一位参赛者躺在床上117个小时。
They have to lie down the whole time.
Players can go to the bathroom one time every 8 hours.
規則很簡單,參賽者不可以坐或站,他們需要躺著一整天,每8小時可以上一次廁所。
Now, people around the world are talking about this game.
Sometimes it's best to take something silly and make something great.
懶惰比賽的規則也許很簡單,但是不容易遵守。
Nope, I'm going to stay in bed the whole day
沒有,我準備待在床上一整天
You don't want to be lazy on such a day
這麼好的一天,你不會想要偷懶
但是我今天真的不想工作,辛苦的
你需要努力工作,才能在人生贏得勝利
Would you like to be lazy all the time?
玩家一年睡了多少小時?

你不知道的趣味新鮮事
Do you want to live on the moon?
這跟在地球生活很不一樣喔
Here the air is safe to breathe
地球的空氣很安全,但月球上有很多的灰塵,吸入這些灰塵很危險,可能會要了你的命。
這要你還想住在月球上嗎?
美國科學家覺得17年後,也就是2040年,我們就可以在月球生活。
科學家說,我們可以用月亮的灰塵做月球住宅,月球的灰塵加水,可以混合成月球水泥,再用3D列印機打造月球住宅。
這樣我們就不需要把笨重的水泥送到月球
科學家們說我們可以在地球下居住
但是我們可以先去月球
在17年間我們可以在地球房屋裏居住
建造月球房屋可以就地取材
Would you like to live in a moon house?
你想住进月球屋里面吗?
You want to send me there?
I can't send you anywhere, even if I want to
就算我想也没办法把你送去任何地方
True, but living on the moon?
那是真的,不过住在月球上吗?
I could be hit by meteors anytime
我可能随时会被流星打到
But from there you can travel to Mars
但是你从那儿可以去火星旅行
火星没有吸引我的东西
我在那儿甚至不能呼吸
After the moon, where do scientists say we can live?

They have two or three hundred students.
有一些离城市远的学校,有大概两三百位的学生。
And some schools are very small.
They are on a mountain, in a forest, or on an island.
They have twenty or thirty students.
还有一些在山上,森林,或离岛更小的学校,有二三十位学生。
Do you know about the school with two students?
That's right, it has two students.
但你知道還有更小的學校嗎?
It's on Hujing Island in Penghu.
Few families live on this small island.
這間學校在澎湖,Hujing Yu,住在島上的家庭,沒生多少。
The two students are in sixth grade.
They will finish elementary school next year.
What happens when there are no students?
學校的兩位學生都是六年級生。
The principal is sad about this.
He knows the five teachers work hard.
He wants to get new students.
他知道學校的五位老師認真教學,他希望能有更多的新學生。
所以,學校每年將會提供新生免費早餐、中餐、文餐,也會提供五張返台計票。
Now there are no new students, but how about you?
Do you want to go to school on a small island?
How about the elementary school on Hujing Island?
小小学校为了吸引学生,不但赠送三餐,还有机票。
This school offers students breakfast, lunch and dinner.
这个学校提供早餐,中饭和晚饭。
我知道,想想看這可以節省你多少時間。
但是我最小的孩子就快畢業了。
I thought he's still 10 years old.
Yeah, kids grow much faster than you think.
是啊,小孩遠比你想的長得快。

不止你不知道的趣味新鮮事
I see R&T's news for kids!
A small town has a big art project called the Time Pyramid.
一座小鎮有個很盛大的藝術計畫
Pyramids take a long time to make.
In Egypt, the Great Pyramid took 20 years.
In Germany, the Time Pyramid is taking about 1200 years.
建金字塔要花很長的時間。
埃及幾薩大金字塔花了20年。
德國的時間金字塔居然要花1200年才能完成。
But this pyramid will be about 7 meters tall, that's small, why is it taking so much time?
这个金字塔只有7公尺高。
那为什么需要这么长的时间呢?
It's because the pyramid marks the town's 1200th birthday,
and the artist wanted people to think about time long from now,
因此,每十年,每一棵樹架都在這棵樹架上。
這麼做是為了慶祝小鎮建立一千兩百週年。
藝術家希望人們可以思考遙遠的未來。
每十年才會放一塊混泥土。
這項計劃開始三十年前。
今年,棵樹架有四棵樹架。
今年时间金字塔摆放了4块混泥土
Some people like this long art project
But every 10 years people go to see one new block go on the time pyramid
Maybe they think about time too
有一些人喜歡這個長遠的藝術計畫,也有一些人覺得很瘋狂。
但是,每十年還是有人去見證擺放新的混泥土塊。
In one thousand two hundred years, how will the world change?
How will the time pyramid change?
這個金字塔還有一千多年才能完成。
I'm working on this art project.
我正在做這個藝術作品。
I didn't know you are an artist.
我都不知道你是藝術家。
我不是,這就是問題所在。
What do you plan to make?
For people to travel back in time.
是讓人回到過去的時間。
No, for them to travel to the year 3000.
不對,是讓他們去西元三千年。
That's what art is all about
I am and your machine looks like a puppy
你的機器看起來像小狗狗
Where is the art project's pyramid?
How many years ago did the project start?
What did the artist want people to think about?

瓜牛是個很小的動物,他們吃水果、蔬菜等等。
所以園丁跟農夫都不喜歡瓜牛。
But many people around the world like snails, they like to eat them.
Some people pay a lot of money to eat snails.
Sometimes they are from gardens, many are from snail farms.
但是,還是有人喜歡蝸牛,也喜歡吃它們。
那這些蝸牛來自哪裡呢?
這些蝸牛有時候是來自花園,很多是來自楊枝場。
Zhang was a vegetable farmer in Taitung.
He grew vegetables for many years.
It was hard work, and maybe snails made his work harder.
張先生曾經是台東的菜農,種菜很辛苦,菜田裡的蝸牛,讓他更辛苦。
現在張先生改養蝸牛,蝸牛需要呵護照顧,一點點的改變都會造成他們的死亡。
但是對張先生來說,養蝸牛比種菜簡單多了。
Jong also sells snails in cans.
He sells sausages made of pork and snails too.
He sells them in Taiwan, Hong Kong and Macau.
Jong先生也賣蝸牛罐頭跟蝸牛香腸。
除了國內,他還賣到香港跟澳門。
Snails changed this vegetable farmer's life.
不種水稻,而去養蝸牛,賺的錢還更多。
It reminds me of my days as a gardener, 讓我想起以前我當園丁的日子。
I grew a lot of tulips, 我種很多玉金香。
沒有,芋精香就夠麻煩了
There would be snails and insects
I may grow cherry trees when I get older
我年紀比較大時也許會種櫻桃樹
Cherries are delicious, 櫻桃很好吃。
They need a lot of care.
